name: top-sheet
description: Gesture-driven top sheet that slides down from the top edge with drag-to-dismiss support.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the sheet is shown

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback invoked when the sheet is dismissed via upward drag or backdrop press

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the top sheet

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum sheet height as a fraction of the screen height (0–1)

props.name: showHandle
props.description: Whether to show the drag handle indicator at the bottom of the sheet

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the sheet container

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
<TopSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)}>
  <Text>Sheet content</Text>
</TopSheet>

examples.label: Example 2
Example 3
examples.code:
// Smaller max height for a notification banner
<TopSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxHeight={0.35}>
  <NotificationDetail />
</TopSheet>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Without handle pill for a custom drag area inside the content
<TopSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} showHandle={false}>
  <SearchHeader onClose={() => setOpen(false)} />
</TopSheet>
